verses.sanskrit: तस्य तद्वचनं श्रुत्वा सीता रौद्रस्य रक्षसः ।आर्ता दीनस्वरा दीनं प्रत्युवाच शनैर्वचः ।। ५.१९.१।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter at that time Seetha a princess without any blame of excellent limbs shook like a plantain 
tree in wind on seeing Ravana the king of rakshasas endowed with beauty and youth adorned with excellent ornaments.

verses.sanskrit: दुःखार्ता रुदती सीता वेपमाना तपस्विनी ।चिन्तयन्ती वरारोहा पतिमेव पतिव्रता ।। ५.१९.२।।।।
तृणमन्तरतः कृत्वा प्रत्युवाच शुचिस्मिता ।निवर्तय मनो मत्तः स्वजने क्रियतां मनः ।। ५.१९.३।।।।
verses.text:
The wide eyed Seetha with excellent color covering stomach with thighs and breasts with hands sat 
down crying.

verses.sanskrit: न मां प्रार्थयितुं युक्तस्त्वं सिद्धिमिव पापकृत् ।अकार्यं न मया कार्यमेकपत्न्या विगर्हितम् ।कुलं सम्प्राप्तया पुण्यं कुले महति जातया ।।५.१९.४।।।।
verses.text:
Ravana saw Seetha protected by batches of ogres looking miserable being struck with grief like 
a ship in danger in the sea.

verses.sanskrit: एवमुक्त्वा तु वैदेही रावणं तं यशस्विनी ।राक्षसं पृष्ठतः कृत्वा भूयो वचनमब्रवीत् ।। ५.१९.५।।।।
verses.text:
Hanuma saw Seetha sitting down on uncovered land, with a firm resolve, like a branch of a tree 
fallen down on earth being torn from the tree.

verses.sanskrit: नाहमौपयिकी भार्या परभार्या सती तव ।साधु धर्ममवेक्षस्व साधु साधुव्रतं चर ।। ५.१९.६।।।।
verses.text:
Hanuma saw Seetha with a stange body with dirt as ornament, who although suited to decorate with 
ornaments was without ornaments. Although She was shining like a lotus stem covered with mud, She was not shining 
also.

verses.sanskrit: यथा तव तथान्येषां रक्ष्या दारा निशाचर ।आत्मानमुपमां कृत्वा स्वेषु दारेषु रम्यताम् ।। ५.१९.७।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was as though going near to Rama a lion among kings with a famous personality with desires 
as chariot tied with thoughts as horses.

verses.sanskrit: अतुष्टं स्वेषु दारेषु चपलं चलितेन्द्रियम् ।नयन्ति निकृतिप्रज्ञां परदाराः पराभवम् ।। ५.१९.८।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha a pleasant one, was emaciated, was crying, being alone having surrendered to Her thoughts 
and sorrow not seeing the end of grief, following the will of Rama.

verses.sanskrit: इह सन्तो न वा सन्ति सतो वा नानुवर्तसे ।वचो मिथ्या प्रणीतात्मा पथ्यमुक्तं विचक्षणैः ।। ५.१९.९।।।।
verses.text:
And also Seetha was like a great she-serpant writhing under the spell of an incantation. She was 
like Rohini being fumigated by a smoke colored planet called Ketu.

verses.sanskrit: अकृतात्मानमासाद्य राजानमनये रतम् ।समृद्धानि विनश्यन्ति राष्ट्राणि नगराणि च ।। ५.१९.१०।।।।
verses.text:
Being born in a virtuous traditional family with good conduct and character and getting married, 
Seetha appeared as if She was born in a bad family.

verses.sanskrit: तथेयं त्वां समासाद्य लङ्का रत्नौघ सङ्कुला ।अपराधात्तवैकस्य नचिराद्विनशिष्यति ।। ५.१९.११।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like fame fallen down due to false blame. She was like education ruined due to lack 
of learning by heart.

verses.sanskrit: स्वकृतैर्हन्यमानस्य रावणादीर्घदर्शिनः ।अभिनन्दन्ति भूतानि विनाशे पापकर्मणः ।। ५.१९.१२।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like deteriorated great fame,like insulted faith,like an understanding grown feeble, 
like dulled hope.

verses.sanskrit: एवं त्वां पापकर्माणं वक्ष्यन्ति निकृता जनाः ।दिष्ट्यैतद्व्यसनं प्राप्तो रौद्र इत्येव हर्षिताः ।। ५.१९.१३।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like an expectation destroyed, like an order flouted; like a blazing quarter during 
a period of destruction, like a worship stolen.

verses.sanskrit: शक्या लोभयितुं नाहमैश्वर्येण धनेन वा ।अनन्या राघवेणाहं भास्करेण प्रभा यथा ।। ५.१९.१४।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like a lotus destroyed, like an army with killed warriors, like light destroyed by darkness, 
like vanished river.

verses.sanskrit: उपधाय भुजं तस्य लोकनाथस्य सत्कृतम् ।कथं नामोपधास्यामि भुजमन्यस्य कस्य चित् ।। ५.१९.१५।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like an altar desecrated, like a tongue of fire gone out, like a full moon night with 
moon devoured by Rahu.

verses.sanskrit: अहमौपयिकी भार्या तस्यैव वसुधापतेः ।व्रतस्नातस्य विप्रस्य विद्येव विदितात्मनः ।। ५.१९.१६।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like a lotus pond agitated with torned out leaves and lotuses, being roughly traeated 
by the trunk of an elephant.

verses.sanskrit: साधु रावण रामेण मां समानय दुःखिताम् ।वने वाशितया सार्धं करेण्वेव गजाधिपम् ।। ५.१९.१७।।।।
verses.text:
Grieved for husband, Seetha was like a river which has dried uo with water caused to flow out lacking 
best washing, was like a new moon night.

verses.sanskrit: मित्रमौपयिकं कर्तुं रामः स्थानं परीप्सता ।वधं चानिच्छता घोरं त्वयासौ पुरुषर्षभः ।। ५.१९.१८।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was a delicate one with well built limbs, accustomed to houses full of diamonds, being tormented 
by heat, like a lotus fibre uprooted short time back.

verses.sanskrit: वर्जयेद्वज्रमुत्सृष्टं वर्जयेदन्तकश् चिरम् ।त्वद्विधं न तु सङ्क्रुद्धो लोकनाथः स राघवः ।। ५.१९.१९।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like a she-elephant captured and tied to a pillar, made to be without the leader of 
herd, sighing, very much tormented by grief.

verses.sanskrit: रामस्य धनुषः शब्दं श्रोष्यसि त्वं महास्वनम् ।शतक्रतुविसृष्टस्य निर्घोषमशनेरिव ।। ५.१९.२०।।।।
verses.text:
With a long single plait, shining without effort, Seetha was like the earth with dark groups of 
trees at the end of rainy season.

verses.sanskrit: इह शीघ्रं सुपर्वाणो ज्वलितास्या इवोरगाः ।इषवो निपतिष्यन्ति रामलक्ष्मणलक्षणाः ।। ५.१९.२१।।।।
verses.text:
Wasted, emaciated due to fasting, due to sorrow, due to thought and due to fear, Seetha was with 
limited food and with austerity as wealth.

verses.sanskrit: रक्षांसि परिनिघ्नन्तः पुर्यामस्यां समन्ततः ।असम्पातं करिष्यन्ति पतन्तः कङ्कवाससः ।। ५.१९.२२।।।।
verses.text:
Seetha was like a celestial being, tormented by grief and by thought with joined palms, desiring 
the defeat of Ravana at the hands of Sri Rama

verses.sanskrit: राक्षसेन्द्रमहासर्पान्स रामगरुडो महान् ।उद्धरिष्यति वेगेन वैनतेय इवोरगान् ।। ५.१९.२३।।।।
verses.text:
Ravana was trying to allure and threatening death to Seetha who was looking at every direction, 
crying, without blame, with good eye lids and reddish and white eyes, with an excessive vow to follow Sri Rama.

verses.sanskrit: अपनेष्यति मां भर्ता त्वत्तः शीघ्रमरिन्दमः ।असुरेभ्यः श्रियं दीप्तां विष्णुस्त्रिभिरिव क्रमैः ।। ५.१९.२४।।।।
जनस्थाने हतस्थाने निहते रक्षसां बले ।अशक्तेन त्वया रक्षः कृतमेतदसाधु वै ।। ५.१९.२५।।।।
आश्रमं तु तयोः शून्यं प्रविश्य नरसिंहयोः ।गोचरं गतयोर्भ्रात्रोरपनीता त्वयाधम ।। ५.१९.२६।।।।
न हि गन्धमुपाघ्राय रामलक्ष्मणयोस्त्वया ।शक्यं सन्दर्शने स्थातुं शुना शार्दूलयोरिव ।। ५.१९.२७।।।।
तस्य ते विग्रहे ताभ्यां युगग्रहणमस्थिरम् ।वृत्रस्येवेन्द्रबाहुभ्यां बाहोरेकस्य निग्रहः ।। ५.१९.२८।।।।
क्षिप्रं तव स नाथो मे रामः सौमित्रिणा सह ।तोयमल्पमिवादित्यः प्राणानादास्यते शरैः ।। ५.१९.२९।।
